creator: peter.thoenen@protonmail.com
text:
Update to latest release.  Fix bad download link.

Content-Description: 3681079260-sfbol.diff.txt
Content-Disposition: inline; filename="sfbol.diff.txt"

diff -ruN sfbol.orig/Makefile sfbol/Makefile
--- sfbol.orig/Makefile	Mon Mar 26 10:13:11 2007
+++ sfbol/Makefile	Mon Mar 26 10:17:16 2007
@@ -5,9 +5,9 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/games/sfbol/Makefile,v 1.7 2007/03/25 04:08:51 kris Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	sfbol
-PORTVERSION=	4.24
+PORTVERSION=	4.37
 CATEGORIES=	games java
-MASTER_SITES=	http://www.sfbonline.com/install4/InstData/Java/
+MASTER_SITES=	http://www.sfbonline.com/programs/
 DISTNAME=	install40
 EXTRACT_SUFX=	.jar
 EXTRACT_ONLY=
@@ -15,11 +15,9 @@
 MAINTAINER=	peter.thoenen@yahoo.com
 COMMENT=	Star Fleet Battles Online
 
-BROKEN=		Unfetchable
-
 IGNOREFILES=	install40.jar
 USE_JAVA=	yes
-JAVA_VERSION=	1.4+
+JAVA_VERSION=	1.5+
 JAVA_RUN=	jre
 JAVA_EXTRACT=	jre
 NO_BUILD=	yes
